no-restricted-syntax.message: Use semantic color tokens (bg-background, text-foreground, text-primary, bg-card, etc.) instead of hardcoded Tailwind palette colors — those don't swap in dark mode. If you truly need a fixed color, eslint-disable-next-line with a reason.

Use semantic color tokens (bg-background, text-foreground, text-primary, bg-card, etc.) instead of hardcoded Tailwind palette colors — those don't swap in dark mode. If you truly need a fixed color, eslint-disable-next-line with a reason.
